entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the primary crop studied in the research

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: GUINEAN SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: The specific region in Ghana where peanut yield gaps were quantified

entities.name: SAVANNA AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The site where field experiments were conducted

entities.name: CROPGRO-PEANUT MODEL
entities.description: A crop model used to simulate growth, yield, and soil water balance of peanut

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of peanut produced, which is limited by various factors

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The developmental process of the peanut crop simulated by the model

entities.name: SOIL WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The simulation of water movement and storage in the soil

entities.name: VARIABLE RAINFALL
entities.description: Fluctuating precipitation that limits peanut yield

entities.name: LOW SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: Insufficient soil nutrients that limit peanut yield

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Biotic agents that cause yield losses in peanut

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that limit peanut yield

entities.name: POOR CROP MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Suboptimal agricultural practices that limit peanut yield

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Practical tests conducted in 1997 and 1998 to evaluate the crop model

entities.name: BIOTIC FACTORS
entities.description: Living factors, such as pests and diseases, that cause yield losses

entities.name: ABIOTIC FACTORS
entities.description: Non-living factors, such as water deficits, that cause yield losses

entities.name: CHINESE
entities.description: A peanut cultivar that matures in 90 days

entities.name: F-MIX
entities.description: A peanut cultivar that matures in 120 days

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: A growing condition where the crop relies solely on rainfall

entities.name: ALFISOL SOIL
entities.description: The specific soil type used during the field experiments

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: The timing of planting, which significantly affected growth and yield

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The maximum yield achievable under ideal conditions

entities.name: LEAF DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting the leaves, attributed to yield decreases in later sowings

entities.name: PERCENTAGE LEAF DEFOLIATION
entities.description: A measured attribute of leaf loss incorporated into the model

entities.name: PERCENTAGE DISEASED LEAF AREA
entities.description: A measured attribute of diseased foliage incorporated into the model

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT FLUCTUATIONS
entities.description: The changes in soil water levels simulated by the model

entities.name: WATER DEFICITS
entities.description: Insufficient water availability that causes yield losses

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments where water availability is the primary limiting factor for yield

entities.name: WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Meteorological data used over 13 years for yield simulations

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms that reduces peanut yield

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum possible yield of the crop

entities.name: YIELD GAPS
entities.description: The difference between potential yield and actual yield
